title: Creamy American Beans Stew
description: A hearty, midnight-craving stew packed with black and kidney beans, smoked paprika, and a velvety oat milk base, perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, smoked paprika, and ground cumin; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add tomato paste and cook for another 30 seconds, swirling to combine.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add drained black beans and kidney beans; stir well.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 20 minutes to meld flavors.
Stir in oat milk and season with salt and pepper; simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes until creamy.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt or pepper.
Serve hot, optionally topped with fresh cilantro or a squeeze of lime for extra brightness.
